message:
feat(core): Add crash recovery module and Runtime error variant

Introduce crash recovery infrastructure for runtime health monitoring
and graceful shutdown tracking. This provides the foundation for
debugging daemon issues and crash reporting.

New module crash.rs includes:
- HealthSnapshot: Captures runtime state including observed panes,
  queue depths, per-pane sequence numbers, ingest lag metrics, and
  database health indicators. Uses global static for crash reports.
- ShutdownSummary: Records graceful shutdown state with final queue
  depths, total segments/events persisted, and cleanup warnings.
- CrashConfig and install_panic_hook placeholder for future custom
  panic handling with health snapshot inclusion.

Error enum additions:
- Add Error::Runtime variant for hot reload failures, channel errors,
  and other runtime-specific error conditions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
